description: Style NoteLet the apple of your eye enjoy some style in this T-shirt from mr.men. Stylized with an interesting graphic print, team it with shorts and comfy footwear for that super cool look.Product DetailsYellow and white striped T-shirt that has a round neck, short yellow raglan sleeves, and Mr. Strong rubber print on the frontMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
